conversations.say: Maren, workers and neighbors are taking the heat for service route gaps. Let's coordinate worker protections and neighborhood space commitments before outsiders dictate terms.
conversations.offer: Neighborhood participation in worker defense coalitions
conversations.request: Concrete contractor and courier protections in writing

conversations.say: Rafi, outsiders are offering cash for service route names. We need a shared boundary right now so nobody turns your ledger into an interrogation target.
conversations.offer: Context on the back room access without exposing local names
conversations.request: Agreement on what details remain strictly off-book

conversations.say: Arden, Veridian wants local legitimacy for this anniversary. Before we lend our names, what concrete space and rent support are you putting in writing?
conversations.offer: Neighborhood goodwill and attendance support for Veridian's event
conversations.request: A written, enforceable commitment for neighborhood space and rent support

public_statement: If institutional attention turns local favors into charges, no one gets a clean story. We protect our neighbors first.

commitments.promise: Coordinate neighborhood and worker protection boundaries against outside inquiry

goal_progress: Initiated talks with Maren on worker and neighborhood protections.
Established contact with Rafi to secure route boundaries.
Challenged Arden on concrete institutional commitments for space and support.
reasoning_summary: Inez focuses on securing concrete institutional commitments from Arden, coordinating defenses with Maren, and protecting Dee and Rafi from outside scrutiny over the unlogged service route access.
